nasb.text: He stood and surveyed the earth; He looked and startled the nations. Yes, the perpetual mountains were shattered, The ancient hills collapsed. His ways are everlasting.

esv.text: He stood and measured the earth; he looked and shook the nations; then the eternal mountains were scattered; the everlasting hills sank low. His were the everlasting ways.

cnv.text: 他站立，震撼全地； 他觀看，驚散列國。 永在的山崩裂，長存的嶺塌陷； 他的道路存到永遠。

ccb.text: 祂停下，大地就震动； 祂观看，万民就战栗。 古老的山岳崩裂， 远古的丘陵塌陷， 但祂的作为永远不变。
